errors.imageObjectsUndetected: No clear objects detected in image. Please try using images with visible people, objects, or buildings
errors.inputTooLarge: File too large. Please use images smaller than 10MB

errors.contentPolicyViolation: Image content violates usage policy. Please select a different image
errors.processingTimeout: Processing timeout. Please retry or use a smaller resolution image
errors.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Please top up your account and try again
errors.imageTooSmall: Image resolution too low. Please use images of at least 512x512 pixels
errors.imageTooBlurry: Image too blurry. Please use a higher quality, clearer image
errors.noFaceDetected: No face detected. Please ensure image contains a clear human face
errors.multipleFacesDetected: Multiple faces detected. Please use an image with only one person
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your connection and retry
errors.serverError: Server temporarily unavailable. Please try again later
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again
errors.unknownError: Unknown error occurred. Please retry or contact support
errors.fallbackError: Unknown error. Please try again with a different image
